interpretation.why_this_matters: The current project should not continue VAE/diffusion/guidance training from policy_obs-derived state-latent data. These guards turn the audit finding into executable protection.

rows.expected: Entrypoints should use one shared helper for pretraining permission and state-latent source checks.
rows.name: Shared training hard-gate utility exists

rows.expected: Wrapper must call enforce_hard_gate and requested permission `start_downstream_vae_training` before invoking the worker.
rows.name: vae wrapper checks hard gate before worker launch

rows.expected: Wrapper must call enforce_hard_gate and requested permission `start_state_latent_diffusion_training` before invoking the worker.
rows.name: diffusion wrapper checks hard gate before worker launch

rows.expected: Wrapper must call enforce_hard_gate and requested permission `start_guided_closed_loop_video_generation` before invoking the worker.
rows.name: guidance wrapper checks hard gate before worker launch

rows.expected: Transformer script should allow dry-run probes but block --full-train when state-latent hard gates fail.
rows.name: Transformer full training is blocked while dry-run remains code-contract only

rows.expected: After the guard smoke checks, output JSON should record blocked_before_worker_launch and does_not_start_training.
rows.name: vae latest output is blocked before worker launch

rows.expected: After the guard smoke checks, output JSON should record blocked_before_worker_launch and does_not_start_training.
rows.name: diffusion latest output is blocked before worker launch

rows.expected: After the guard smoke checks, output JSON should record blocked_before_worker_launch and does_not_start_training.
rows.name: guidance latest output is blocked before worker launch

rows.expected: After the guard smoke checks, output JSON should record blocked_before_worker_launch and does_not_start_training.
rows.name: transformer latest output is blocked before worker launch
